//: Built with tspc: BOTH the @rhombus-std/di.transformer plugin and its options satellite lower the tokenless registration/resolution forms in src/main.ts. The two transformers' declare-module augmentations enter the program via `types` so the authored forms type-check under both tspc (build) and tspc --noEmit (lint). An explicit `types` array opts OUT of TypeScript's automatic ambient-@types discovery, so @types/bun is listed too -- the Generic Host's source (process.cwd()/process.stdout, node:path) now reaches into this program via @rhombus-std/hosting, and without it plain `process`/`node:*` go unresolved (the without-transformer app never hits this because it leaves `types` unset and gets the repo-root @types/bun for free). The di family is now dist-referenced (§72), so its `types` conditions resolve the built d.ts directly (the augmented core class cannot co-compile with di source) -- no `built` custom condition needed. module:ESNext keeps relative + bare specifiers verbatim so node ESM resolves dist at runtime; the DOM lib supplies console + AbortSignal (the latter reached transitively through options → primitives).
